ast.source: Toggle sort priority between X-first and y-first
ast.target: 切换排序优先级为 X 优先或 y 优先

ast.name: title
ast.target: 将地图居中于此六边形

ast.name: title
ast.source: Copy a Markdown link to open this workflow
ast.target: 复制一个 Markdown 链接以打开此工作流

ast.name: title
ast.source: Copy a Markdown link to this table
ast.target: 复制一个指向此表格的 Markdown 链接

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 沿六边形边缘（紧凑边界）

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 蜿蜒（通过边缘中点的曲线）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Apply a solid colour to the icon shape (works best with monochrome icons).
ast.target: 将纯色应用于图标形状（最适合单色图标）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Group this terrain with similar types in the filter.
ast.target: 在筛选器中将此地形与类似类型分组。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Search for an existing note, or type a name to create one.
ast.target: 搜索现有笔记，或输入名称以创建新笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-open the setup wizard to reconfigure folders or create a new map.
ast.target: 重新打开设置向导以重新配置文件夹或创建新地图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Die size used when creating new random table notes (d6, d20, d100, etc.).
ast.target: 创建新随机表格笔记时使用的骰子大小（d6、d20、d100 等）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which sections open collapsed by default in the right-click hex editor.
ast.target: 选择在右键单击六边形编辑器中默认折叠哪些部分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The map opened when the hex map is launched.
ast.target: 启动六边形地图时打开的地图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pointy-top: points face north/south, flat sides east/west. Flat-top: flat sides face north/south, points east/west.
ast.target: 尖顶朝上：尖端朝向南北，平面朝向东西。平顶朝上：平面朝向南北，尖端朝向东西。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which set of columns (flat-top) or rows (pointy-top) is offset by half a hex. Affects how new maps render unless overridden per-map.
ast.target: 哪一组列（平顶）或行（尖顶）偏移半个六边形。影响新地图的渲染方式，除非在每个地图中覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default columns and rows when creating a new top-level map.
ast.target: 创建新顶级地图时的默认列数和行数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default columns and rows when creating a new submap.
ast.target: 创建新子地图时的默认列数和行数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder containing additional icon images (PNG, JPG, SVG, etc.) for the terrain palette and hex icon override. These are merged with the built-in icons.
ast.target: 相对于保险库的文件夹，包含用于地形调色板和六边形图标覆盖的附加图标图像（PNG、JPG、SVG 等）。这些与内置图标合并。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Creates missing terrain table notes, adds roller links to all table notes (so they can be opened in the hexmaker roller from within Obsidian), and links each hex note's terrain encounters table into its encounters table section.
ast.target: 创建缺失的地形表格笔记，向所有表格笔记添加掷骰链接（以便可以在 Obsidian 内从六边形制作器掷骰器中打开它们），并将每个六边形笔记的地形遭遇表链接到其遭遇表部分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path. Scopes the file search when adding links to hexes.
ast.target: 相对于保险库的路径。限定向六边形添加链接时的文件搜索范围。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Populates any blank folder settings below with defaults under the world folder, then creates those folders in your vault. Only blank fields are affected — manually set values are left untouched.
ast.target: 使用世界文件夹下的默认值填充任何空白的文件夹设置，然后在您的保险库中创建这些文件夹。仅影响空白字段——手动设置的值保持不变。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path where hex notes (X_y.md) are stored.
ast.target: 存储六边形笔记（X_y.md）的相对于保险库的路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder to populate the towns dropdown in the hex editor. Files starting with _ are excluded.
ast.target: 相对于保险库的文件夹，用于填充六边形编辑器中的城镇下拉列表。以 _ 开头的文件被排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder to populate the dungeons dropdown in the hex editor. Files starting with _ are excluded.
ast.target: 相对于保险库的文件夹，用于填充六边形编辑器中的地牢下拉列表。以 _ 开头的文件被排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder to populate the quests dropdown in the hex editor. Files starting with _ are excluded.
ast.target: 相对于保险库的文件夹，用于填充六边形编辑器中的任务下拉列表。以 _ 开头的文件被排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder to populate the features dropdown in the hex editor. Files starting with _ are excluded.
ast.target: 相对于保险库的文件夹，用于填充六边形编辑器中的特征下拉列表。以 _ 开头的文件被排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder to populate the factions dropdown in the hex editor. Files starting with _ are excluded.
ast.target: 相对于保险库的文件夹，用于填充六边形编辑器中的阵营下拉列表。以 _ 开头的文件被排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder for geographic region notes (used by the region overlay paint tool). Files starting with _ are excluded.
ast.target: 用于地理区域笔记的相对于保险库的文件夹（由区域覆盖绘制工具使用）。以 _ 开头的文件被排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder for random table notes. Used by the encounters table section and the random tables view.
ast.target: 用于随机表格笔记的相对于保险库的文件夹。由遭遇表部分和随机表格视图使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder for workflow notes. Browsable from the random tables view via the workflows tab.
ast.target: 用于工作流笔记的相对于保险库的文件夹。可通过随机表格视图的工作流选项卡浏览。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 六边形编辑器部分默认折叠

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 生成地形表与六边形链接

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Search for a file to link...

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 未找到支持的图像文件。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 六边形地图 — 控件与工具

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid dice formula — use format like 2d6+6
ast.target: 骰子公式无效 — 请使用类似 2d6+6 的格式

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Configure a workflows folder in settings first.
ast.target: 请先在设置中配置工作流文件夹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Flat sides face north and south — wider hexes
ast.target: 平边朝向南北 — 六边形更宽

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Points face north and south — taller hexes
ast.target: 尖角朝向南北 — 六边形更高

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 从文件夹或文件生成（可选）…

ast.name: text
ast.source: Or copy from an existing palette:

ast.name: text
ast.source: Set an icons folder in settings to upload custom icons.
ast.target: 请在设置中指定图标文件夹以上传自定义图标。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Drag & drop images here, or click to browse
ast.target: 将图片拖放到此处，或点击浏览

ast.name: text
ast.source: For best results, use 64–128 px square images
ast.target: 为获得最佳效果，请使用64–128像素的方形图片

ast.name: text
ast.source: Hex labels and filenames start from these values instead of 0,0.
ast.target: 六边形标签和文件名将从这些值开始，而非0,0。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No path types defined. Switch to edit mode to add one.
ast.target: 未定义路径类型。请切换到编辑模式以添加。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Left-click to include  ·  right-click to exclude  ·  click a category heading to toggle all
ast.target: 左键点击以包含  ·  右键点击以排除  ·  点击类别标题以切换全部

ast.name: text
ast.target: 无法读取六边形文件夹。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select a table to view and roll.
ast.target: 选择一个表格以查看和掷骰。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No workflows folder configured. Set it in settings.
ast.target: 未配置工作流文件夹。请在设置中设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No steps. Click Edit to add steps.
ast.target: 无步骤。点击编辑以添加步骤。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No entries found. Check the table format.
ast.target: 未找到条目。请检查表格格式。

ast.name: text
ast.target: + 使用此表格新建工作流

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ configure all folder settings above before selecting generate. This will create terrain table notes, add roller links to all table notes, and link each hex note to its terrain's encounters table. Safe to run multiple times — existing notes and links are not overwritten.
ast.target: ⚠️ 请在选择生成前配置好所有文件夹设置。这将创建地形表格笔记，为所有表格笔记添加掷骰链接，并将每个六边形笔记链接到其地形的遭遇表。可安全多次运行——现有笔记和链接不会被覆盖。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Each region uses one palette. Assign a palette when creating a region — it cannot be changed after. Edit palette contents from the terrain tool on the hex map.
ast.target: 每个区域使用一个调色板。创建区域时分配调色板——之后无法更改。可在六边形地图的地形工具中编辑调色板内容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No maps found. Create a map first.
ast.target: 未找到地图。请先创建一张地图。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Hexmaker turns your Obsidian vault into a living, interactive hex map. Each hex on the map is a Markdown note — you can paint terrain, add icons, link towns, dungeons, factions, and encounter tables, and run random tables right from the map.
ast.target: Hexmaker 将您的 Obsidian 库转变为一个生动、互动的六边形地图。地图上的每个六边形都是一个 Markdown 笔记——您可以绘制地形、添加图标、链接城镇、地下城、派系和遭遇表，并直接从地图运行随机表。

ast.name: text
ast.source: In the next few steps we'll set up your world folders, pick a layout for your first map, and generate all the hex notes. It takes about a minute.
ast.target: 在接下来的几个步骤中，我们将设置您的世界文件夹，为您的第一张地图选择布局，并生成所有六边形笔记。这大约需要一分钟。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This panel doesn't block anything — feel free to click around Obsidian, browse the file tree, or create folders while it's open.
ast.target: 此面板不会阻塞任何操作——您可以随意点击 Obsidian、浏览文件树或在打开时创建文件夹。

ast.name: text
ast.source: All your hex notes, tables, factions, and world data will live under one folder. Type a name — it'll be created automatically if it doesn't exist.
ast.target: 您所有的六边形笔记、表格、派系和世界数据都将存放在一个文件夹下。输入一个名称——如果不存在，将自动创建。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 单独配置每个文件夹路径

ast.name: text
ast.source: Give your map a name and choose how big it should be. You can always expand the grid or add more maps later.
ast.target: 为您的地图命名并选择其大小。您随时可以扩展网格或稍后添加更多地图。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your world is all set up. Here's a summary of what was created:
ast.target: 您的世界已全部设置完成。以下是已创建内容的摘要：

ast.name: text
ast.source: A few things to try first:

ast.name: text
ast.source: The map icon in the left ribbon opens your hex map any time. Folders, palettes, and more can be adjusted under plugin settings.
ast.target: 左侧功能区中的地图图标可随时打开您的六边形地图。文件夹、调色板等可在插件设置中调整。

ast.name: title
ast.target: 按权重排序条目（低 → 高）

ast.name: title
ast.target: 按字母顺序排序条目（a → z）

ast.name: title
ast.target: 将地图居中于此六边形

ast.name: title
ast.source: Re-links every hex's encounters table section to match its current terrain
ast.target: 重新链接每个六边形的遭遇表部分以匹配其当前地形

ast.name: title
ast.source: Open hex table (middle-click for new tab)
ast.target: 打开六边形表格（中键点击在新标签页打开）

ast.name: title
ast.source: Open random tables (middle-click for new tab)
ast.target: 打开随机表（中键点击在新标签页打开）

ast.name: title
ast.target: 您的世界应存放在何处？
